name: GOLFTEC La Quinta
about: GOLFTEC is a technology-driven golf instruction and fitting center that focuses on data-driven improvement through personalized coaching and advanced equipment. The La Quinta location is part of a national franchise known for using systems like OPTIMOTION, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide detailed feedback on swing mechanics. Their services include private lessons, club fittings, and practice sessions designed for golfers seeking to improve their game with expert guidance and precise measurement tools. The facilities are equipped with simulator bays for both instruction and practice, offering an indoor training environment for golfers of all skill levels to work on their game.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced motion-tracking technology provides immediate visual feedback to identify swing issues
Data-driven club fitting can add an average of 21 more yards off the tee
PGA-certified coaches offer personalized improvement plans based on swing analysis
Indoor simulator bays allow for practice and lessons regardless of weather conditions
Practice memberships provide access to training facilities with launch monitors and video feedback

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar launch monitor for tracking ball and club data

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but GOLFTEC also provides club rentals and professional club fitting services with equipment from top brands.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drinks to my session?
faq.answer: No food or drinks are mentioned as being available at the facility, and there's no indication of BYOB policies.

faq.question: How long does it take to complete 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: While not specified in the content, typical simulator sessions for 18 holes usually take 45-60 minutes depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers junior programs and has been identified as kid-friendly, making it suitable for young golfers to receive professional instruction.
